notes: Bulk taxonomy survey of all 36 brains (36 Read calls in ~90s burst) followed by architectural recommendation (subfolders vs frontmatter categories) and immediate Task agent dispatch to implement. Claude produced 8-category taxonomy inline in chat; David pasted it back as agent spec — inline-knowledge anti-pattern. File count discrepancy investigated (590 curated vs 1500 total files) via 6 Bash probes. 13h gap then single 'commit this' close. No /rename, no handover. Proposed new subtype: knowledge.survey_and_implement (survey triggers implementation in same session). KNOWLEDGE label retained as primary; BUILD component present in second half.
